netXml: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><pnml xmlns="http://www.pnml.org/version-2009/grammar/pnml"><net id="testNet" type="http://www.pnml.org/version-2009/grammar/ptnet"><name><text>Test Petri Net</text></name><place id="p1"><name><text>Place1</text></name><initialMarking><text>2</text></initialMarking></place><place id="p2"><name><text>Place2</text></name><initialMarking><text>0</text></initialMarking></place><transition id="t1"><name><text>T1</text></name><toolspecific tool="PetriObjModel" version="1.0"><timeDelay>1.5</timeDelay><priority>1</priority><probability>1.0</probability></toolspecific></transition><arc id="a1" source="p1" target="t1"><inscription><text>1</text></inscription></arc><arc id="a2" source="t1" target="p2"><inscription><text>1</text></inscription></arc></net></pnml>
